creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #9)

> … UEFI boot and without drm, the system gives a black screen on 
> wakeup from suspend to RAM (probably to be expected). …

For what it's worth: I should not expect that. 

Using Konsole in Plasma, before and after sleep: 


root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # kldstat | grep -e drm -e nvidia
15    1 0xffffffff85333000   107330 nvidia-modeset.ko
16    1 0xffffffff85600000  1fcfa10 nvidia.ko
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # pkg iinfo nvidia
linux-nvidia-libs-470-470.161.03
nvidia-driver-470-470.161.03
nvidia-settings-470.86_1
nvidia-xconfig-525.116.04
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # uname -aKU
FreeBSD mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd 15.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT #14 main-n265350-72d97e1dd9cc-dirty: Sat Sep 16 03:50:44 BST 2023     grahamperrin@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC amd64 1500000 1500000
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # date ; uptime ; zzz
Tue Sep 19 02:23:01 BST 2023
 2:23AM  up 10:36, 7 users, load averages: 1.23, 1.31, 1.67
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # date ; grep suspend /var/log/messages
Tue Sep 19 02:27:13 BST 2023
Sep 17 15:28:34 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd acpi[61578]: suspend at 20230917 15:28:34
Sep 18 08:31:55 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd acpi[81414]: suspend at 20230918 08:31:55
Sep 18 17:39:29 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd acpi[14197]: suspend at 20230918 17:39:29
Sep 19 02:23:08 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd acpi[94334]: suspend at 20230919 02:23:08
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ #
